---
title: "McKeesport Parcel Map"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    page-layout: full
    output-file: index.html
    output-dir: docs
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{css}
* { box-sizing: border-box; }
html, body {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  height: 100%;
  font-family: system-ui, sans-serif;
  background: #f5f5f5;
}
#page-wrapper {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  height: 100vh;
}
#header {
  padding: 0.6rem 1.2rem 0.4rem;
  background: #1a3a6b;
  color: #fff;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
#header h1 {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.01em;
}
#header p {
  margin: 0.15rem 0 0;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
}
#map-container {
  flex: 1;
  min-height: 0;
}
.leaflet-container {
  width: 100% !important;
  height: 100% !important;
}
```

```{r setup}
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(leaflet)
library(htmltools)

gdb_path  <- "McKee_Dev_Parcels.gdb"
gdb_layer <- "Parcels_Ownership_Dev"

center_lat <- 40.3425
center_lon <- -79.8491
```

```{r data}
# Columns needed for tooltips, coloring, and layer logic — nothing else
map_cols <- c(
  "PIN", "PROPERTYHOUSENUM", "PROPERTYADDRESS",
  "PROPERTYOWNER", "TAXDESC",
  "CLASSDESC", "USEDESC", "HOMESTEADFLAG", "NEIGHDESC",
  "COUNTYTOTAL", "FAIRMARKETLAND", "FAIRMARKETBUILDING", "FAIRMARKETTOTAL",
  "SALEDATE", "SALEPRICE", "SALEDESC",
  "PREVSALEDATE", "PREVSALEPRICE",
  "PREVSALEDATE2", "PREVSALEPRICE2",
  "Dist_num", "Use_Type"
)

parcels <- st_read(gdb_path, layer = gdb_layer, quiet = TRUE) |>
  st_zm(drop = TRUE) |>
  st_transform(4326) |>
  st_simplify(preserveTopology = TRUE, dTolerance = 0.00003) |>
  select(any_of(map_cols)) |>
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_trim)) |>
  mutate(across(where(\(x) inherits(x, "POSIXct") || inherits(x, "Date")),
                \(x) format(x, "%Y-%m-%d"))) |>
  mutate(Use_Type = if_else(Use_Type == "Med Desnity", "Med Density", Use_Type))
```

```{r labels}
fmt_dollar <- function(x) {
  ifelse(is.na(x) | x == 0, "\u2014",
    paste0("$", formatC(as.numeric(x), format = "f", digits = 0, big.mark = ",")))
}

fmt_date <- function(x) {
  ifelse(is.na(x) | str_trim(x) == "", "\u2014", str_trim(x))
}

classify_owner <- function(owner, taxdesc) {
  o <- toupper(coalesce(owner, ""))
  t <- toupper(coalesce(taxdesc, ""))

  if (startsWith(t, "12 - PUBLIC UTILITY REALTY TAX")) return("Utilities (PURTA)")

  church_kw <- c("CHURCH", "PARISH", "PRESBYTERIAN", "BAPTIST", "CATHOLIC", "LUTHERAN",
                 "EPISCOPAL", "METHODIST", "TEMPLE", "SYNAGOGUE", "MOSQUE", "DIOCESE",
                 "MINISTR", "MISSION", "CONGREGATION")
  if (any(str_detect(o, fixed(church_kw)))) return("Institution")

  if (str_detect(o, fixed("CITY OF MCKEESPORT")) ||
      str_detect(o, fixed("CITY OF MC KEESPORT")) ||
      (str_detect(o, fixed("MCKEESPORT")) && str_detect(o, fixed("REDEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY"))) ||
      (str_detect(o, fixed("MCKEESPORT")) && str_detect(o, fixed("PARKING AUTHORITY"))) ||
      (str_detect(o, fixed("MCKEESPORT")) && str_detect(o, fixed("HOUSING AUTHORITY")))) {
    return("City")
  }

  if (str_detect(o, fixed("ALLEGHENY COUNTY")) || str_detect(o, fixed("COUNTY OF "))) {
    return("County")
  }

  if (t == "10 - EXEMPT") return("Institution")

  fp <- c("HOSPITALITY CORP", " LLC", " LP", " INC", "INVESTMENT", "RENTAL")
  has_fp <- any(str_detect(o, fixed(fp)))

  if (str_detect(o, fixed("SECRETARY OF VETERANS"))) return("Institution")
  if (str_detect(o, fixed("SECRETARY OF"))) return("Other Public")

  inst_kw <- c("FOUNDATION", "CHARITABLE", "COMMUNITY SERVICES",
               "MON YOUGH COMMUNITY SERVICES", "MON-YOUGH COMMUNITY SERVICES",
               "HOSPITAL", "YOUNG MENS CHRISTIAN", "YMCA", "YWCA",
               "SALVATION ARMY", "LODGE", "VETERANS", "WELFARE ASSOCIATION",
               "NONPROFIT", "NON-PROFIT", "NON PROFIT")
  if (!has_fp && any(str_detect(o, fixed(inst_kw)))) return("Institution")

  pub_kw <- c("AUTHORITY", "SCHOOL DISTRICT", "BOROUGH OF", "TOWNSHIP OF",
              "COMMONWEALTH OF", "UNITED STATES", "US GOVT", "U S GOVERNMENT",
              "PENNSYLVANIA TURNPIKE", "PORT AUTHORITY")
  if (any(str_detect(o, fixed(pub_kw)))) return("Other Public")

  "Private"
}

parcels <- parcels |>
  mutate(own_type = mapply(classify_owner, PROPERTYOWNER, TAXDESC))

use_type_colors <- c(
  "Low Density"  = "#F5C518",
  "Med Density"  = "#F0A500",
  "High Density" = "#A89000",
  "Planned Unit" = "#E8650A",
  "Mixed Use"    = "#7BAFD4",
  "Hotel"        = "#4A7FBF",
  "CSA"          = "#2E6B1A"
)

own_colors <- c(
  "Private"           = "#4a90d9",
  "City"              = "#e8890c",
  "County"            = "#7b1fa2",
  "Institution"       = "#2e7d32",
  "Other Public"      = "#b0bec5",
  "Utilities (PURTA)" = "#78909c"
)

parcels <- parcels |>
  mutate(
    fill_color      = unname(coalesce(own_colors[own_type], "#78909c")),
    dist_fill_color = unname(coalesce(use_type_colors[Use_Type], "#cccccc")),
    addr_str = str_trim(paste(
      coalesce(as.character(PROPERTYHOUSENUM), ""),
      coalesce(PROPERTYADDRESS, "")
    )),
    dist_html = ifelse(
      !is.na(Dist_num) & Dist_num > 0,
      paste0(
        "<hr style='margin:6px 0;border:none;border-top:1px solid #eee'>",
        "<b>Development District</b><br>",
        "District #: <b>", Dist_num, "</b><br>",
        "Use type: ", coalesce(Use_Type, "\u2014")
      ),
      ""
    ),
    label_html = paste0(
      "<div style='font-family:system-ui,sans-serif;font-size:12px;line-height:1.5;",
      "max-width:300px;word-wrap:break-word;overflow-wrap:break-word'>",
      "<b style='font-size:14px'>", addr_str, "</b><br>",
      "<span style='color:#888;font-size:11px'>PIN: ", PIN, "</span>",

      "<hr style='margin:6px 0;border:none;border-top:1px solid #eee'>",
      "<b>Owner</b><br>",
      coalesce(PROPERTYOWNER, "\u2014"), "<br>",
      "Ownership type: <b>", own_type, "</b><br>",
      "Tax status: ", coalesce(TAXDESC, "\u2014"),

      "<hr style='margin:6px 0;border:none;border-top:1px solid #eee'>",
      "<b>Classification</b><br>",
      "Class: ", coalesce(CLASSDESC, "\u2014"), "<br>",
      "Use: ", coalesce(USEDESC, "\u2014"),

      "<hr style='margin:6px 0;border:none;border-top:1px solid #eee'>",
      "<b>Assessed Value</b><br>",
      "County total: ", fmt_dollar(COUNTYTOTAL), "<br>",
      "Fair market: <b>", fmt_dollar(FAIRMARKETTOTAL), "</b><br>",
      "Land: ", fmt_dollar(FAIRMARKETLAND), "<br>",
      "Building: ", fmt_dollar(FAIRMARKETBUILDING),

      "<hr style='margin:6px 0;border:none;border-top:1px solid #eee'>",
      "<b>Sale History</b><br>",
      "Last sale: ", fmt_date(SALEDATE), " &mdash; ", fmt_dollar(SALEPRICE),
      ifelse(!is.na(SALEDESC) & SALEDESC != "", paste0(" <i>(", SALEDESC, ")</i>"), ""), "<br>",
      "Prior: ", fmt_date(PREVSALEDATE), " &mdash; ", fmt_dollar(PREVSALEPRICE), "<br>",
      "2nd prior: ", fmt_date(PREVSALEDATE2), " &mdash; ", fmt_dollar(PREVSALEPRICE2),

      dist_html,

      "</div>"
    )
  )
```

```{r map}
dist_parcels <- parcels |> filter(!is.na(Dist_num) & Dist_num > 0)

dist_labels <- dist_parcels |>
  select(Dist_num) |>
  group_by(Dist_num) |>
  summarise(.groups = "drop")

dist_coords <- st_coordinates(st_centroid(dist_labels))
dist_labels$lng <- dist_coords[, 1]
dist_labels$lat <- dist_coords[, 2]

m <- leaflet(
  options = leafletOptions(
    minZoom   = 13,
    maxZoom   = 19,
    maxBounds = list(
      list(center_lat - 0.06, center_lon - 0.09),
      list(center_lat + 0.06, center_lon + 0.09)
    )
  )
) |>

  addProviderTiles("CartoDB.Positron",  group = "Light (default)") |>
  addProviderTiles("Esri.WorldImagery", group = "Satellite") |>

  addPolygons(
    data        = parcels,
    fillColor   = "#cccccc",
    fillOpacity = 0.4,
    color       = "#555",
    weight      = 0.7,
    opacity     = 0.8,
    label        = ~lapply(label_html, HTML),
    labelOptions = labelOptions(
      style     = list("font-size" = "12px", "max-width" = "300px"),
      sticky    = FALSE,
      direction = "auto"
    ),
    popup        = ~label_html,
    popupOptions = popupOptions(maxWidth = 320, closeOnClick = FALSE),
    group = "Parcels"
  ) |>

  addPolygons(
    data        = parcels,
    fillColor   = ~fill_color,
    fillOpacity = 0.55,
    color       = "#333",
    weight      = 0.7,
    opacity     = 0.8,
    label        = ~lapply(label_html, HTML),
    labelOptions = labelOptions(
      style     = list("font-size" = "12px", "max-width" = "300px"),
      sticky    = FALSE,
      direction = "auto"
    ),
    popup        = ~label_html,
    popupOptions = popupOptions(maxWidth = 320, closeOnClick = FALSE),
    group = "Ownership Type"
  ) |>

  addPolygons(
    data        = dist_parcels,
    fillColor   = ~dist_fill_color,
    fillOpacity = 0.65,
    color       = "#555",
    weight      = 0.7,
    opacity     = 0.8,
    label        = ~lapply(label_html, HTML),
    labelOptions = labelOptions(
      style     = list("font-size" = "12px", "max-width" = "300px"),
      sticky    = FALSE,
      direction = "auto"
    ),
    popup        = ~label_html,
    popupOptions = popupOptions(maxWidth = 320, closeOnClick = FALSE),
    group = "Development Districts"
  ) |>
  addLabelOnlyMarkers(
    data         = dist_labels,
    lng          = ~lng,
    lat          = ~lat,
    label        = ~as.character(Dist_num),
    labelOptions = labelOptions(
      noHide    = TRUE,
      direction = "center",
      textOnly  = TRUE,
      style     = list(
        "font-weight"   = "bold",
        "font-size"     = "12px",
        "color"         = "#333",
        "background"    = "rgba(255,255,255,0.75)",
        "border"        = "none",
        "padding"       = "2px 4px",
        "border-radius" = "3px"
      )
    ),
    group = "Development Districts"
  ) |>

  addLegend(
    position = "bottomright",
    colors   = c("#4a90d9", "#e8890c", "#7b1fa2", "#2e7d32", "#b0bec5", "#78909c"),
    labels   = c("Private", "City", "County", "Institution", "Other Public",
                 "Utilities (PURTA)"),
    title    = "Ownership Type",
    opacity  = 0.85,
    layerId  = "legend-ownership",
    group    = "Ownership Type"
  ) |>

  addLegend(
    position = "bottomright",
    colors   = c("#F5C518", "#F0A500", "#A89000", "#E8650A", "#7BAFD4", "#4A7FBF", "#2E6B1A"),
    labels   = c("Low Density", "Med Density", "High Density", "Planned Unit",
                 "Mixed Use", "Hotel", "CSA"),
    title    = "Development District Use",
    opacity  = 0.85,
    layerId  = "legend-districts",
    group    = "Development Districts"
  ) |>

  addLayersControl(
    baseGroups    = c("Light (default)", "Satellite"),
    overlayGroups = c("Parcels", "Ownership Type", "Development Districts"),
    position      = "topright",
    options       = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE)
  ) |>

  hideGroup("Ownership Type") |>
  hideGroup("Development Districts") |>

  addScaleBar(position = "bottomleft") |>

  fitBounds(
    lng1 = center_lon - 0.03, lat1 = center_lat - 0.02,
    lng2 = center_lon + 0.03, lat2 = center_lat + 0.02
  ) |>

  htmlwidgets::onRender("
    function(el, x) {
      var map = this;
      var legendIds = {
        'Ownership Type': 'legend-ownership',
        'Development Districts': 'legend-districts'
      };
      Object.values(legendIds).forEach(function(lid) {
        var el2 = document.querySelector('[data-layerid=\"' + lid + '\"]');
        if (el2) el2.style.display = 'none';
      });
      map.on('overlayremove', function(e) {
        var lid = legendIds[e.name];
        if (lid) {
          var el2 = document.querySelector('[data-layerid=\"' + lid + '\"]');
          if (el2) el2.style.display = 'none';
        }
      });
      map.on('overlayadd', function(e) {
        var lid = legendIds[e.name];
        if (lid) {
          var el2 = document.querySelector('[data-layerid=\"' + lid + '\"]');
          if (el2) el2.style.display = '';
        }
      });
      var ctrl = el.querySelector('.leaflet-control-layers');
      if (ctrl) {
        var baseDiv = ctrl.querySelector('.leaflet-control-layers-base');
        if (baseDiv) {
          var lbl = document.createElement('div');
          lbl.style.cssText = 'font-weight:600;font-size:11px;color:#555;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.04em;margin-bottom:4px;padding-top:2px';
          lbl.textContent = 'Basemap Style';
          baseDiv.insertBefore(lbl, baseDiv.firstChild);
        }
        var overlayDiv = ctrl.querySelector('.leaflet-control-layers-overlays');
        if (overlayDiv) {
          var lbl2 = document.createElement('div');
          lbl2.style.cssText = 'font-weight:600;font-size:11px;color:#555;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.04em;margin-bottom:4px;margin-top:6px;padding-top:4px;border-top:1px solid #ddd';
          lbl2.textContent = 'Layer Data';
          overlayDiv.insertBefore(lbl2, overlayDiv.firstChild);
        }
      }
    }
  ")

# Wrap map in full-height layout with header
tagList(
  tags$div(id = "page-wrapper",
    tags$div(id = "header",
      tags$h1("McKeesport Parcel Map"),
      tags$p(
        "Hover or click any parcel for ownership, use, assessed value, and sale history. ",
        tags$a(
          href   = "https://www.wprdc.org/",
          target = "_blank",
          style  = "color:rgba(255,255,255,0.75);text-decoration:underline",
          "Data: Allegheny County Assessor via WPRDC, October 2025."
        )
      )
    ),
    tags$div(id = "map-container", m)
  )
)
```
